fields.name: mainNavItem
fields.label: Main Nav Item Text
fields.description: Text for the main nav item (e.g., Personal Banking, Business Banking)

fields.name: mainNavItemGroup_label
fields.label: Main Nav Item Label
fields.description: Label for the main nav item (e.g., Personal Home, Business Home)

fields.name: mainNavItemGroup_link
fields.label: Main Nav Item Title Link
fields.description: URL for the main nav item title (e.g. Personal Home Url, Business Home Url)

fields.name: image_src
fields.label: Column Image
fields.description: Image displayed at top of megamenu column

fields.name: image_alt
fields.label: Alternative Text for Accessibility 1
fields.description: Write descriptive, concise, relevant alt text to describe the image in context, enhancing accessibility for visually impaired users and improving SEO.

fields.name: links
fields.label: Column Links
fields.description: Structured links using H3 for category titles and list items for links

fields.name: quickNavLabel
fields.label: Quick Nav Label
fields.description: Label for the Quick Nav Item

fields.name: quickNavImage_src
fields.label: Icon Image
fields.description: Icon image shown next to link

fields.name: quickNavImage_alt
fields.label: Alternative Text for Accessibility 1
fields.description: Write descriptive, concise, relevant alt text to describe the image in context, enhancing accessibility for visually impaired users and improving SEO.
